compliance.note: OPERATOR OVERRIDE — real court-ordered listing data published on the public LP during the bridge period, before GVR WebAPI authorization. Standard rule is research-tier only (see scripts/scrape-foreclosure-deals.mjs header). Override accepted and directed by Amir Omidvar; flagged for managing-broker awareness (Shirin Saleh, licence #X031527) — CREA Code-of-Ethics / MLS display exposure on her licence. Photos: Paragon authorization is per-listing. The 6 listings with images shipped under the 2026-05-16 photo authorization that the managing broker confirmed; those 6 have been verified still active via the 2026-06-11 aggregator scrape. The 6 additional listings shipped 2026-06-11 are sourced from public aggregator pages (price, neighborhood, sqft, street name only) and intentionally do NOT show a per-listing photo — the card displays a branded 'photo + full address on intro call' placeholder. Across both groups: street numbers fully removed (street name + neighborhood only); MLS numbers omitted from public cards (retained in research dump foreclosure-deals.scraped.json); no listing remarks, no agent names. Replace this file with the GVR-feed-backed source once the WebAPI is authorized.

refreshHistory.note: 3 listings closed/withdrew (College Park Port Moody, False Creek Vancouver, Park Royal West Vancouver); 6 remaining confirmed active via 3-aggregator scrape

expanded with 6 additional aggregator-sourced listings without per-listing photos (placeholder card with 'photo + address on intro call' framing); freshness signal for the LP without breaking Paragon per-listing photo authorization
